title: 虚言は人のためならず

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: One day, during a casual chat with Inari One...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Tellin' lies just isn't my strong suit. Even if I try to
keep a straight face, people can tell I'm lyin' right
away.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
It's a rare necessity anyhow. Us Edo folk prefer to
keep it honest.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Sorry, but could you help me? Please!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Oh, wazzup, Creek? You okay?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Actually, I'm being followed, and the person
chasing me is going to catch up any second now!
Do you think I could hide here for a short while?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya seem pretty relaxed for someone bein' chased.
Am I missin' somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whatever the case, I'm sure you're not the bad
guy in this. We gotta stick together in times of
trouble, eh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Super Creek hurries to take refuge in a locker.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Excuse me, Inari! I have an urgent request!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey, Bamboo. What's got ya all worked up?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: I'm chasing Creek! I'm putting out a warrant for her capture after she went on an indiscriminate pampering spree!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: H-huh? She did what?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Rattin' Creek out will make me a liar for sayin'
she could trust me. But if I'm gonna protect her, I
gotta lie all the same... Gahhh...)

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure she ran this way. You didn't
happen to see her, did you, Inari?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ah?! W-well!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Hm, did you see her?! Is she here?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: N-nah! I...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...Nope, no clue where she could've scurried off
to. Sorry!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? Well, if you say she hasn't come here, I
believe you! Oh, but wait, perhaps she crept in
here without you realizing it?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya think? Go ahead and take a look around then!
You're good to search anywhere besides that
locker!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Locker? Is there something in there?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ah! W-well, ya see... That locker there is...
haunted! That's right! It's got some creepy
creature livin' inside!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(Gragh! Lyin' to my cute underclassman... what
the heck am I doin'? But I can't break my promise
to Creek either! This sucks!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite Inari One's clumsy lies, she manages to
avoid exposing Super Creek. Then, just when
Bamboo Memory is about to give up her pursuit...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Ya satisfied, Bamboo? Whew... this is more tirin'
than runnin'...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your cooperation, Inari! Well, I
should get going. See y—huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Bamboo Memory's gaze falls upon... a rattle toy
seemingly dropped by Super Creek!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: This rattle?! Isn't it one of Creek's seven tools?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
N-no, ya got it all wrong! That's not Creek's...
it's... it's...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: It's mine!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Truth is, I've been kinda tired lately. And it... ya
know... it's just the thing to help me relax... Uh...
Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Really?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Ah.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Why didn't you say something earlier?! Whenever you need to relax, come to me so I can help you!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What're ya doin', Creek?! The jig is up now! I
knew it, I'm no good at lyin'!
choice_data_list: You could've pulled it off with one last push.
If you'd hung on until the end, then maybe...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What, ya mean tellin' more lies?! No friggin' way! I
can't help but tell the truth.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
No wonder you started crying for comfort. ♪
There, there!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Sh-shut it! Ah, crap! I'll never tell another lie
again!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Super Creek is finally taken away, she shoots a
suspiciously longing gaze at Inari One.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, the heck was I supposed to do? Only a
real fast-talker coulda pulled that off!
choice_data_list: Do you want to get in some lying practice?
Do you want to get in some lying practice?

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: That makes you guilty of the crime of preparing to practice deception! And considering your previous lie, as disciplinary committee chair, I can't let this slip!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text: Sigh... It's a real shame, Inari, but at least let me be the one to put the cuffs on you. All of you are under arrest!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the three of us are apprehended and
escorted away.
